behavior_summary: This script implements the game behavior for a consumable fish item. When a player 'looks' at the fish, the item emits a short description ('fish ').

When the player 'uses' (consumes) the fish, the item emits a consumption message ('Mmmm... '), is removed/destroyed from the world/inventory, and the player/avatar is fed (small numeric amount inferred).
BP+06h is the item/process identifier passed into handlers and is used as the target for Item::bark and Item::destroy calls. Temporary strings are allocated for messages and freed after use.
notable_control_flow: U8P_MOREFISH::MOREFISH::look: constructs the literal 'fish ' string, calls Item::bark with the item PID, frees the string, sets an implied return/handled flag (implies pattern), then suspends/returns. (confidence: high)

U8P_MOREFISH::MOREFISH::use: sets item/process info state (engine opcodes), constructs 'Mmmm... ' and calls Item::bark, frees the string, calls Item::destroy on the same item/process, then calls FeedAvatar with an immediate 0x02 to restore hunger, and returns. (confidence: high)
open_questions: Exact semantic meaning of the 'implies' sequence used in the U8P_MOREFISH::look handler (how the engine interprets the pushed retval/implied flag) — inferred only from bytecode (confidence: medium).
Precise numeric unit/value semantics for the pushed 0x02 passed to FeedAvatar (likely hunger points but exact scale is inferred) — inferred (confidence: medium).

Whether any other engine-side state changes (beyond destroy and FeedAvatar) occur implicitly when the use handler sets process/info state prior to barking — observed but not fully identified (confidence: low).

main_function.name: U8P_MOREFISH::look
main_function.purpose: Respond to the 'U8P_MOREFISH::look' (inspect) event for the fish item by presenting a short description to the player and marking the event as handled.
entry_conditions: Event 0 ('U8P_MOREFISH::look') dispatched by the game engine when an actor inspects or examines the fish item.

function_map.name: U8P_MOREFISH::look
function_map.role: Handle the 'U8P_MOREFISH::look' event: emit descriptive text and set handler return/handled state.

function_map.name: U8P_MOREFISH::use
function_map.role: Handle the 'use' (consume) event: play consumption text, destroy the item, and feed the avatar.

function_map.name: Item::bark
function_map.role: Engine/item routine to emit short text/dialog originating from an item/process.

function_map.name: Item::destroy
function_map.role: Engine routine to remove/destroy an item instance.

function_map.name: FeedAvatar
function_map.role: Engine routine to increase the avatar's food/hunger meter by a supplied amount.

external_calls.purpose: Show a short descriptive string ('fish ') to the player/process that inspected the item.
Play the consumption message ('Mmmm... ') when the fish is used.
Remove/consume the fish item after it has been used.
Restore a small amount of the avatar's hunger/food meter (immediate 0x02 observed; numeric unit inferred).

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements the game behavior for a consumable fish item. When a player 'looks' at the fish, the item emits a short description ('fish ').
